positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a crescent moon nestled among bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate night-blooming flowers. The scene should feature a playful composition with deep indigo and cosmic teal gradients contrasting against warm pops of ethereal lavender, pale gold, and luminous cyan. Elements should include subtle geometric patterns integrated into the flora and fauna, such as delicate constellations mapping out the mushroom caps. High contrast, clean vector aesthetic, minimalist yet magical. Perfect for apparel printing, featuring a strong central vignette and clean, sharp lines, reminiscent of Art Nouveau etching merged with modern graphic illustration. Flat vector colors with detailed gradients and clean silhouettes. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, 8K, highly stylized.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low quality, text, watermark, logo, signature, excessive detail, messy, dirty, noise, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, mutated, grain
